_patch_meta.description: Full pre-analysis classification for guilt registry. Classifies all 59 None-status terms: 26 extracted, 33 deleted as bleed. Restores G1777 and G2631 to in-scope. Adds missing HIGH_FREQUENCY_ANCHOR flags on G0264 and G0265. Inserts three programme research flags. This replaces V1 and V2 which used incorrect operation types.

operations.description: Extract core Greek sin vocabulary — HAMARTIA family

set.status_note: Core guilt registry vocabulary — Greek sin/sinner/sinless family

operations.description: Extract Greek conscience vocabulary — SUNEIDESIS family

set.status_note: Conscience vocabulary — inner knowing of guilt

operations.description: Extract Hebrew sin vocabulary — CHATA family (sin, sinner, sin-offering)

set.status_note: Core guilt registry vocabulary — Hebrew sin/sin-offering family

operations.description: Extract Hebrew grace and supplication vocabulary — CHEN/CHANAN family (guilt resolution vocabulary)

set.status_note: Guilt resolution vocabulary — grace, graciousness, and supplication as response to guilt

operations.description: Extract Hebrew iniquity vocabulary — AVON family (iniquity, perversity, twisting)

set.status_note: Core guilt registry vocabulary — iniquity as moral perversity and its guilt/punishment dimensions

operations.description: Extract NASA guilt-core sub-glosses — bear, raise, and forgive senses only

set.status_note: NASA guilt-core: H5375H bear (bearing guilt/iniquity), H5375I forgive (lifting of guilt), H5375G raise (lift up face — acceptance after guilt, Exo 20:7 guiltless)

operations.description: Delete bleed — Greek terms not guilt vocabulary: G0154 aiteō (general petition — pray registry), G0157 aitiama (forensic legal charge, one verse only)

set.exclusion_reason: Bleed vocabulary. G0154 aiteō is general petition/request — pray registry. G0157 aitiama is forensic legal procedure, not inner guilt state.

operations.description: Delete bleed — peripheral CHEN family terms: chin (beauty), chaninah (favour, 1 occurrence), Hananel (proper noun)

set.exclusion_reason: Bleed vocabulary. H2433 chin beauty — peripheral aesthetic sense. H2594 chaninah favour — single occurrence, adequately covered by chen/chanan. H2606 Chananel — proper noun, Tower of Hananel.

operations.description: Delete bleed — MASSA family terms not carrying guilt vocabulary: burden (physical), oracle, respect, smoke, tribute

set.exclusion_reason: Bleed vocabulary. Physical burden and oracle senses of massa not guilt vocabulary. Guilt-as-burden concept covered by NASA bearing senses already extracted.

operations.description: Delete bleed — NASA peripheral sub-glosses: all non-guilt senses of nasa (aid, exalt, look, loud, trust, vow, kindness, fight, enthuse, journey, marry, count, armour-bearer, give gift) plus NASA derivatives (ne.sa, nis.set, ne.su.ah)

set.exclusion_reason: Bleed vocabulary. Peripheral NASA sub-glosses with no guilt semantic content. Guilt-relevant NASA senses (bear, forgive, raise) extracted separately in OP-006.

operations.description: Delete bleed — NA.SI sub-glosses: leader/prince (H5387A) and mist (H5387B) — neither is guilt vocabulary

set.exclusion_reason: Bleed vocabulary. H5387A na.si leader/prince — political/social term, not guilt vocabulary. H5387B na.si mist — meteorological term, no guilt semantic content.

operations.description: Delete bleed — SE.ET/SI family: elevation (H7613), loftiness (H7863), Mount Sirion (H7865)

set.exclusion_reason: Bleed vocabulary. H7613 se.et elevation — majority of verses are skin swellings (Lev 13-14) and divine majesty; Gen 4:7 analytically noted but covered by NASA raise. H7863/H7865 — loftiness and proper noun, no guilt content.

operations.description: Delete bleed — H2603B cha.nan be loathsome — peripheral CHEN sub-gloss, 1 occurrence, not guilt vocabulary

set.exclusion_reason: Bleed vocabulary. Secondary negative sense of chanan (be loathsome/abhorrent), 1 occurrence. Not guilt vocabulary. Grace sense covered by H2603A extracted in OP-004.

set.status_note: Restored to in-scope. Decision confirmed Leroux 2026-03-25. Enochos: liable for — guilt as legal liability before a court. Mat 5:21-22, Mar 3:29, 1Cor 11:27, Jam 2:10.
Restored to in-scope. Decision confirmed Leroux 2026-03-25. Katakrima: condemnation — the verdict-state of guilt. Appears at anchor verse Rom 8:1 and Rom 5:16-18.

record.description: Condemnation (katakrima/katakrinō family) is a candidate for a new registry entry. G2631 katakrima and root family G2632 katakrinō (to condemn), katakrisis, akatakritos, autokatakritos constitute a distinct inner-being vocabulary cluster addressing the judicial-moral verdict-state. Analytically distinct from guilt (moral fact of wrongdoing) and shame (relational/exposure experience). The condemnation/no-condemnation polarity is the structural framework of Romans 5-8 and is signalled by anchor verse Rom 8:1. ACTION: Check word_registry for existing condemnation entry. If absent, create new registry with anchor verse Rom 8:1 and run Session A extraction on G2632 family.

G0264 hamartanō (to sin, occ=241) has only 37 verses in the export — 15% coverage. Synthesis-level conclusions about the verbal form of sin in the NT cannot be drawn from this sample alone. Full verse set required before Phase 2 synthesis.

G0265 hamartēma (sin as discrete act, occ=26) has only 4 verses in the export — 15% coverage. The distinction between hamartia (sin as state/principle) and hamartēma (sin as individual act) is analytically significant. Conclusions about this distinction require Phase 2 full-verse verification.

_patch_summary.note: All operations use supported PATCH_SPEC §3 operation types. No manual verse operations. MTI classification of all 59 None-status terms plus restoration of G1777 and G2631 from delete_flagged. After application Claude Code should re-export — verse contamination on H2603B and H5387B resolves automatically once those terms are classified as delete.
